response.justification: The candidate significantly exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of professional experience, including recent full-stack work in TypeScript/Node.js with React and MongoDB, cloud/containerization experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling development, which is an explicitly required and rare skill. Strong testing culture (TDD, built test frameworks, taught testing courses) matches the quality expectations. Gaps are moderate: no explicit Nest.js experience, limited evidence of recent Kotlin/Java production work, and Vitest/Playwright are not named directly, though his testing background suggests fast ramp-up.
strengths: Current AI-agent and MCP infrastructure development experience, directly matching the AI agent requirement
Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js + React experience with MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored testing libraries and taught testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed, the primary backend framework for the role
Kotlin/Java exposure appears dated and shallow relative to the secondary stack needs
Vitest, Jest, and Playwright are not explicitly mentioned despite broad testing expertise

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and modern JS test-framework specifics
